```{r Validation rule 40: surgery LOS mismatch}
if ("los" %in% colnames(data$surgeryData))
  problems <- problems |>
    dplyr::bind_rows(
      data$enrollments |>
        dplyr::select("patient_key", "enrollment_key", "enrolledAt") |>
        dplyr::inner_join(
          data$events |>
            dplyr::filter(.data$event_type_key == "pro") |>
            dplyr::select("enrollment_key", "event_key", "occurredAt"),
          dplyr::join_by("enrollment_key")) |>
        dplyr::inner_join(
          data$surgeryData |>
            dplyr::select("event_key", "los"),
          dplyr::join_by("event_key")) |>
        dplyr::mutate(los_calc = as.integer(.data$occurredAt - .data$enrolledAt)) |>
        dplyr::filter(.data$los != .data$los_calc) |>
        dplyr::anti_join(
          exceptions |> dplyr::filter(.data$rule_id == 40L),
          dplyr::join_by("event_key")) |>
        tidyr::nest(context = c("los", "los_calc")) |>
        dplyr::mutate(
          rule_id        = 40L,
          patient_key    = .data$patient_key,
          enrollment_key = .data$enrollment_key,
          event_key      = .data$event_key,
          context        = .data$context,
          .keep = "none"))
```
